summary: Comprehensive test suite with strong unit coverage of glob patterns (docs/**, src/api/**, **/*.test.*), label deduplication, priority ordering, and error handling. Integration tests properly validate workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and execution via act. Tests follow TDD methodology with clear comments. Well-organized into unit and integration layers. Minor gaps: (1) some edge cases untested (null values in properties, empty string patterns, mixed-separator paths, case sensitivity); (2) integration tests reference five test cases (TC1-TC5) and verify their expected outputs, but the workflow fixture setup that generates these outputs is not shown in provided code—assumes correct workflow implementation. Unit tests alone would score 5/5; integration test design is sound but depends on unseen workflow implementation. Overall, a trustworthy suite that would catch most regressions in glob matching, rule application, and priority handling.
